text:
is in 15 Degrees
In the same East sign of Sagittarius.
Saturn is in 3 Degrees.
Therefore we have to consider
SATURN +VENUS + MERCURY+ MOON
Saturn indicates the planet of work or career or profession.
According to degrees.
SATURN + VENUS + MERCURY+ MOON.
In the 2nd there is Venus, Mercmy in the 3rd and Moon in
the 4th.
WORK+ WEALTH+ INTELLECT+ART.
Hence native will have extraordinary intellect, having
knowledge in artistic lines, besides being wealthy.
Or
VENUS+SATURN+MERCURY+ MOON
VENUS (WEALTH).
SATURN (WORK).
MERCURY (BUSINESS)
MOON (TRANSACTION)
Hence native does money transactional business for career.
Wife of the native
While predicting for the native's wife in the above
Chart-IV Venus is the life of the native and 2nd to venus there is
Mercmy according to degrees.
Hence wife is intellectual type and next there is Moon.
Hence, she is artistic, knowledgeable, intelligent, soft and idealistic.

22 FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY
